title: MedicationDispense → drug_exposure (RxNorm)
notes:
Synthea does not emit MedicationDispense, so this branch is exercised only by synthetic cases against the real pipeline.

`MedicationDispense__drug_exposure.sql` models the pharmacist's actual dispense event:
- `drug_type_concept_id = 38000176` (vocab name in this bundle: 'Prescription dispensed through mail order'; the SQL comment calls it 'Dispensed in Outpatient office' — only the integer constant is asserted, the `__name` sibling records the live concept_name).
- Vocabulary cascade RxNorm (prio 1) > NDC (prio 2). Each candidate is resolved by an **inner** JOIN: `vocab.concept (source) → 'Maps to' → vocab.concept (standard, domain_id='Drug', standard_concept='S')`, `DISTINCT ON (staging_id) ORDER BY prio, std.concept_id`. There is **no status filter** on this edge — the only way a MedicationDispense produces zero rows is when no candidate code resolves to a standard Drug (the inner JOIN drops it).
- Dates: `drug_exposure_start_date = end_date = whenHandedOver::date`; the `_datetime` pair is `whenHandedOver::timestamp` (the `+00:00` offset is truncated to wall-clock, no UTC shift — unlike Procedure). `quantity = quantity.value::numeric`, `days_supply = daysSupply.value::integer` — both ARE populated for this edge (unlike MedicationAdministration, which leaves them NULL).
- `person_id ← subject`, `visit_occurrence_id ← context` (R4 `MedicationDispense.context`). NO provider mapped → `provider_id` NULL. `drug_source_value = left(src_code,50)`, `drug_source_concept_id = src.concept_id`.

Grounding notes from the live May-2026 Athena bundle:
- RxNorm 313782 (acetaminophen 325 MG Oral Tablet) → standard Drug 1127433 (self-map: source concept_id == standard concept_id == 1127433, vocabulary_id='RxNorm', domain_id='Drug', standard 'S'). Exactly one standard-Drug 'Maps to' target.
- RxNorm 1665060 (cefazolin 2000 MG Injection) → standard Drug 46287345 (self-map). Shared with the MedicationRequest/MedicationAdministration sibling cases.
- NDC 13668021990 (aripiprazole 15 MG Oral Tablet): source concept 46249776 → standard Drug 19096776. Exercises the prio-2 NDC fallback union branch.
- RxNorm 99999999 does not exist in this bundle's `vocab.concept` (count 0) — the inner resolve JOIN drops it, so it produces zero rows (negative variant).

Every non-NULL drug_exposure column is asserted; the columns the stage-2 SELECT hard-codes to NULL (verbatim_end_date, stop_reason, refills, sig, route_concept_id, lot_number, provider_id, visit_detail_id, route_source_value, dose_unit_source_value) are omitted and therefore asserted NULL. drug_exposure is the ONLY target table for this branch; an `omop:{}` case asserts zero rows everywhere.

cases.desc: (a) MedicationDispense RxNorm standard Drug → drug_exposure, type 38000176, start=end=whenHandedOver, quantity + days_supply populated, visit from context, NO provider

(b) MedicationDispense NDC-only (no RxNorm) exercises the prio-2 NDC fallback union branch -> NDC 13668021990 (source 46249776) crosswalks to standard Drug 19096776, type 38000176, no encounter context -> visit_occurrence_id NULL

drug_exposure.drug_source_concept_id__name: aripiprazole 15 MG Oral Tablet (NDC source concept)

cases.desc: (c) MedicationDispense with BOTH RxNorm and NDC codes -> prio-1 RxNorm wins (DISTINCT ON ... ORDER BY prio); RxNorm 1665060 -> standard Drug 46287345, NDC ignored

(d) NEGATIVE: MedicationDispense whose only code (RxNorm 99999999) is absent from vocab -> the inner resolve JOIN finds no source/standard Drug -> zero rows (this edge has no status filter, so an unresolvable code is the only drop path)
